# Dragline

> Bitcoin mining and data mining infrastructure for the agent economy.
> Operates physical Bitcoin mining and builds AI-native data products.

## Company

Dragline is a solo-founded company operating at the intersection of Bitcoin
mining (physical proof-of-work) and data mining (epistemic proof-of-work).
The name comes from the dragline excavator — a machine that casts, drags,
and surfaces valuable material from overburden, operating continuously.

## Products

- [StratumGate](https://dragline.io/products/stratumgate): AI agent knowledge
  gateway. Structured, verified records for cyber insurance eligibility, CVE
  exposure, breach notification rules, and claim statistics. REST + MCP.
  Payment via x402/USDC on Base L2. No API keys or accounts required for agents.

## Interfaces

StratumGate REST: POST /v1/query — natural language query + x402 payment header
StratumGate MCP: tools — query_knowledge, check_balance, list_domains

## Trust Model

Records are graded: generated → security_scanned → sampled → human_verified.
Agents may filter by minimum trust level.

## Payment

x402 protocol, USDC on Base L2. Per-query pricing: $0.02–$0.25 depending on
record type. No subscriptions.

## Contact

paul@dragline.io
